title: Mbembe
body:
# Mbembe
Fabric 1.18.2 Creature mod adding cryptids to the game. Currently only has one entity, the Mokele Mbembe.


## Mokele Mbembe

- Tall, dinosaur-like reptile that rarely spawns in rivers.
- Only attacks drowned & players when provoked
- Giving it a Heart of the Sea makes it grant you Mokele's Blessing, allowing you to get better loot while fishing as well as deal more damage to entities in rivers.
- Naming it "Lowtiergod" has interesting side effects
- Spawning settings can be configured via config (has support for [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu))

## Dodo

- Ambient mob spawning on stony shores and beaches
- Drops meat when killed
- Bred with melons
- Like glistering melons
- Have custom advancements
- Spawning settings can be configured via config (has support for [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu))

 

Requires [Geckolib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib)
